title: gerascanthus vestitus
side_effects: Gerascanthus vestitus can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to severe symptoms like headaches, dizziness, and even respiratory problems. In rare cases, improper use of the plant may cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. If not used correctly, the plant's active ingredients can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
